chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-785 of 2024 Jubilee Spinning & Weaving Mills Limited Versus Securities & Exchange Commission of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.3731/2024 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 06.08.2024 Mr. Haider Waheed, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Tariq Qureshi, advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Shahan Karimi, advocate for respondent. No.3. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The grievances, for which apparently this petition was filed, perhaps were redressed, as identified in para-5 and 16 of parawise comments of respondent No.1/SECP. Petitioner’s counsel submits that without prejudice to their rights in such circumstances, they would not press this petition subject to their right to agitate their grievance, if need be, pursuance to a fresh cause. The petition as such is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
